_comment: Odoo 18 differentiation from odoo-17 base: search(domain=...) keyword (was search(args=...)), aggregator='sum' field attr (was group_operator=), unified check_access(operation), <list> view tag preferred over <tree>, name_get() deprecated → _compute_display_name(). Reuses odoo-17 rule pack since deltas are additive-not-breaking for review purposes. See templates/cursor/skills/odoo/odoo-code-patterns/references/odoo-18-patterns.md for full delta list.
description: Odoo 18 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.10+, OWL, search(domain=...), <list> view tag, unified check_access(). Reuses odoo-17 rule pack — see odoo-18-patterns.md for deltas.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-18/ is authored. v18 deltas (search keyword, aggregator, check_access) covered in skill references only.
_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json by a FUTURE installer step (setup.py --merge-invariants, not yet wired — Wave C). Inherits the odoo-17 overlay conceptually (name_get, attrs/states, create_multi all still apply) plus the v18 deltas below. Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json entries. severity=warn. Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 18 prefers the <list> view tag over <tree> for new list views (both legal; do not auto-rewrite existing <tree>).
invariants_overlay.rationale: v18 introduced <list> as the preferred list-view tag; <tree> still works but new views should use <list> (odoo-18-patterns.md). Fix when violated: keep a valid <list> or <tree> root for the list view the edit was modifying.

v18 replaced the separate check_access_rights()/check_access_rule() pair with a single check_access(operation) call (odoo-18-patterns.md). New ACL guards must use the unified form. Fix when violated: restore the check_access(...) call the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 18 renamed the read_group aggregator field attr group_operator='sum' to aggregator='sum'.
invariants_overlay.rationale: v18 renamed the field aggregation attribute from group_operator= to aggregator= (odoo-18-patterns.md). New stored/aggregated fields use aggregator=. Fix when violated: restore the aggregator= attribute the edit dropped (or migrate group_operator= → aggregator=).
